mapper.select: SELECT ir.index_link,ir.info FROM chaos_admin ia LEFT JOIN chaos_admin_role iar ON ia.mu = iar.admin_mu LEFT JOIN chaos_role ir ON iar.role_mu = ir.mu WHERE ia.mu = #{mu}
SELECT ia.username, ia. NAME, ia.`status`, ia.platform_mu, iar.role_mu FROM chaos_admin ia LEFT JOIN chaos_admin_role iar ON iar.admin_mu = ia.mu WHERE ia.mu = #{mu}
